notes:
Tried playing for a bit with both xbox 360 controller and keyboard + mouse, only issue I ever had was minor stutter once or twice.

Ran the game on highest at ~60FPS.
title: MoonQuest

notes:
Seems to run beautifully initially, but then pretty consistently crashes after a few minutes of play with a perplexing error message from the Wine C++ runtime library:
----------------------------------
R

Program: Z
a

Press OK to exit the program, or Cancel to start the Wine debugger.
----------------------------------

I tried installing the VC2017 runtime via protontricks to see if it would make a difference and it didn't.
title: MoonQuest
